name: Combat
description: Weapons use, tactical positioning, and fighting under pressure.

options.name: Firearms
options.description: Unlocks ranged combat assignments and weapon maintenance tasks.

options.name: Melee
options.description: Unlocks close-quarters engagement and unarmed defence tasks.

options.name: Tactics
options.description: Unlocks squad coordination and breach-and-clear operations.

options.name: Breaching
options.description: Unlocks forced entry and room-clearing tasks.

options.name: Suppression
options.description: Unlocks suppressive fire and area-denial tasks.

name: Conditioning
description: Physical endurance, load-bearing, and sustained exertion under harsh conditions.

options.name: Hauling
options.description: Unlocks heavy cargo transport and oversized load handling.

options.name: Resilience
options.description: Unlocks extended shift assignments and deprivation-resistance tasks.

options.name: Athletics
options.description: Unlocks rapid traversal and climbing assignments.

options.name: Zero-G Adaptation
options.description: Unlocks EVA tasks and zero-gravity construction assignments.

options.name: Hazmat
options.description: Unlocks work in contaminated or extreme-environment zones.

name: Subterfuge
description: Stealth, concealment, manipulation, and clandestine operations.

options.name: Stealth
options.description: Unlocks covert movement and infiltration tasks.

options.name: Concealment
options.description: Unlocks contraband hiding and cargo smuggling tasks.

options.name: Manipulation
options.description: Unlocks social manipulation and deception assignments.

options.name: Lockpicking
options.description: Unlocks secure compartment bypass and access overrides.

options.name: Forgery
options.description: Unlocks document fabrication and identity spoofing tasks.

name: Fabrication
description: Construction, repair, and manufacturing of physical structures and equipment.

options.name: Construction
options.description: Unlocks structural block placement and load-bearing assembly tasks.

options.name: Machining
options.description: Unlocks precision part manufacturing and tooling tasks.

options.name: Welding
options.description: Unlocks hull repair and pressure-seal welding assignments.

options.name: Advanced Construction
options.description: Unlocks multi-module structural projects and complex assemblies.

options.name: Armour Fabrication
options.description: Unlocks protective equipment manufacturing and armour plating tasks.

name: Science
description: Research, analysis, experimentation, and scientific discovery.

options.name: Physics
options.description: Unlocks propulsion and energy research branches.

options.name: Biology
options.description: Unlocks biological research and xenobiology survey tasks.

options.name: Chemistry
options.description: Unlocks chemical synthesis and materials science research.

options.name: Advanced Research
options.description: Unlocks tier-3 research nodes and experimental project leads.

options.name: Xenology
options.description: Unlocks alien artefact analysis and first-contact protocol tasks.

name: Navigation
description: Route planning, stellar cartography, and piloting vessels through hazardous space.

options.name: Astrocartography
options.description: Unlocks sector mapping and deep-space survey assignments.

options.name: Shuttle Pilot
options.description: Unlocks solo shuttle flight and docking approach tasks.

options.name: Hazard Navigation
options.description: Unlocks asteroid field and debris-zone traversal tasks.

options.name: Deep Space Navigation
options.description: Unlocks long-range independent mission flights.

options.name: Combat Piloting
options.description: Unlocks evasive manoeuvres and combat approach vectors.

options.name: Diagnosis
options.description: Unlocks medical assessment tasks.

options.name: Treatment
options.description: Unlocks wound care, medication, and disease management tasks.

options.name: Psychology
options.description: Unlocks counselling and sanity intervention tasks.

options.name: Surgery
options.description: Unlocks invasive surgical procedures.

options.name: Prosthetics
options.description: Unlocks implant and augmentation fitting.

name: Provisioning
description: Food preparation, resource allocation, and supply-chain management.

options.name: Cooking
options.description: Unlocks advanced meal preparation and dietary planning tasks.

options.name: Botany
options.description: Unlocks advanced hydroponics and crop specialisation tasks.

options.name: Logistics
options.description: Unlocks supply-chain optimisation and stockpile management tasks.

options.name: Rationing
options.description: Unlocks strict rationing protocols and emergency supply distribution.

options.name: Advanced Cultivation
options.description: Unlocks exotic crop cultivation and accelerated yield techniques.

name: Social
description: Diplomacy, negotiation, leadership, and interpersonal relationships.

options.name: Diplomacy
options.description: Unlocks faction negotiation and treaty drafting tasks.

options.name: Leadership
options.description: Unlocks crew morale boosting and command-structure tasks.

options.name: Persuasion
options.description: Unlocks high-stakes negotiation and trade influence tasks.

options.name: Articulation
options.description: Grants +2 Leadership Capacity, improving how many direct reports a lead can manage.

options.name: Recruitment
options.description: Unlocks NPC recruitment and faction defection tasks.

options.name: Interrogation
options.description: Unlocks prisoner interrogation and intelligence extraction tasks.
